name: vcep-research
description: Generic skill that produces a one-page, fully-cited Markdown briefing for a ClinGen Variant or Gene Curation Expert Panel (or a gene). Pulls panel status, chairs, and scope from the dgai-clingen MCP; recent ClinVar activity and three to five PubMed references from NCBI E-utilities (or the pubmed-database skill when installed); and a one-line phenotype note from OMIM. Every claim is footnoted to a source URL.
